# DieHardNation
Independent college fan gear aggregator covering all 130 FBS schools.
Products sourced from eBay and Amazon via affiliate partnerships.
Not affiliated with any university, conference, or NCAA.

## Coverage
130 FBS schools across SEC, Big Ten, Big 12, ACC, and all other conferences.
8 sports per school: football, basketball, volleyball, wrestling,
baseball, softball, track, and general fan gear.

## Pages
/[school]/ — School fan gear hub
/[school]/gear/[sport]/ — Sport-specific gear
/[school]/gear/[sport]/[filter]/ — Filtered gear by category or price
/[school]/news/ — School news and game recaps
/[school]/gift-guides/ — Gift guide collections
/[school]/product/[slug]/ — Individual product pages
/trending — Most popular gear across all schools
/news — Latest news from all schools
